texto: We can't just rail against crime. We must speak of the root problems - devastating family breakup, an insidious culture of violence that cheapens human life, skyrocketing prisoner recidivism rates that rob our communities of husbands and fathers - and recognize that there is a societal role in rehabilitation and restoration.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Frank Wolf sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “We can't just rail against crime. We must speak of the root problems - devastating family breakup…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a familia, vida, culture, útil em momentos de termino e culture.
